name: Hakase Anime
bio_short: Your anime professor is in. Rankings, recommendations & deep dives — if it hits different, we cover it. New video every week. 博士
bio_long:
Welcome to Hakase Anime — your guide to the best anime has to offer.

We break down rankings, hidden gems, must-watch series, and the moments that made anime history. Whether you're new to anime or a seasoned veteran, there's always something worth discovering.

📌 New videos weekly
🎌 Top lists · Character breakdowns · Season recaps · Lore dives

Drop your favorite anime in the comments — the professor is always taking notes. 博士

brand.character_concept: Dark brooding anime male: short spiky black hair, dark-framed glasses, black high-collar jacket, thoughtful hand-near-face pose. Background is a crimson red brushstroke circle on deep black — rising sun motif with grunge texture.
brand.palette: deep black #0d0d0d background, crimson red #CC0000 accents, white #FFFFFF text — no gold, no purple, no blue
brand.style: Dark manga-ink aesthetic, grungy brushstroke textures, high contrast black and red, dramatic shadows, Japanese rising sun motif, intense and brooding

dalle_prompts.profile: Anime character portrait, brooding male: short spiky black hair, dark-framed glasses, black high-collar jacket, hand raised pensively near face. Deep black background with a bold crimson red brushstroke circle behind the character, grunge texture. Dark manga-ink style, high contrast, dramatic shadows. Centered square composition, character fills the frame. No text, no watermarks, no logos.
dalle_prompts.banner: Wide anime banner, deep black background (#0d0d0d), large bold crimson red brushstroke circle (rising sun) in the center. Multiple iconic anime characters — Naruto, Luffy, Attack on Titan Colossal Titan, Demon Slayer, Goku, Jujutsu Kaisen — arranged left and right in dark high-contrast manga-ink style with red and black color treatment. Gothic bold typography space for 'HAKASE ANIME' title. Grungy brushstroke textures, ultra-detailed, cinematic 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermarks, no logos.
